hero.greeting: Hi! I'm Bobby, your science guide 🐧
hero.title: Welcome to BobbyWasi!
hero.subtitle: 🌿 Your companion in scientific adventures 🔬

meetBobby.title: 🐧 Meet Bobby
meetBobby.description: Hi! I'm Bobby, a very curious Humboldt penguin who loves science. I come from the coasts of Peru and I love to explore, experiment and learn new things.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.description: Help children discover science in a fun and safe way

values.title: My Values
values.description: Curiosity, Safety and Fun in every experiment

step1.title: Choose
step1.description: Select your favorite experiment from our collection

step2.title: Gather
step2.description: Get the materials you already have at home

step3.title: Experiment
step3.description: Follow the instructions and learn while having fun!

volcano.title: Baking Soda Volcano
volcano.description: The most popular! Create spectacular eruptions

circuit.title: Electric Circuit
circuit.description: The most educational! Learn about electricity

rocket.title: Water Rocket
rocket.description: The most exciting! Launch your own rocket

green.title: Green Level
green.description: Totally safe! You can do it alone 😊

yellow.title: Yellow Level
yellow.description: Better with help! Ask an adult 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

learning.title: Learn by Playing
learning.description: Each experiment includes fun and easy-to-understand scientific explanations

materials.title: Home Materials
materials.description: Use things you already have at home. Nothing complicated or expensive!

safe.title: 100% Safe
safe.description: Each experiment has been reviewed to ensure your safety

stepByStep.title: Step by Step
stepByStep.description: Clear and detailed instructions so you don't get lost

cta.title: 🌿 Ready for Your First Scientific Adventure? 🔬
cta.subtitle: Bobby is waiting for you with 10 incredible experiments!

noExperiments.title: Oops! No experiments yet
noExperiments.description: Experiments will be loaded from the /experiments directory

noResults.title: Oops! No experiments at this level yet
noResults.description: Try another level or come back soon

footer.title: 🎉 More experiments coming soon! 🎉
footer.description: Bobby is working to bring you more scientific fun
